FieldCure RAG — Document indexing and hybrid search engine

Usage:
  fieldcure-mcp-rag serve --base-path <path>           Start multi-KB MCP search server (stdio)
  fieldcure-mcp-rag exec  --path <kb-path> [--force]   Run headless indexing for a single KB

Exit codes (exec mode):
  0  Succeeded
  1  Failed
  2  Cancelled
